title: AI Weather Quest 2025
one_liner: Building a DL/ML model for Seasonal-to-Subseasonal weather forecasting in a competitive setting.
problem: S2S forecasting sits in the 'predictability desert' — beyond weather but before climate. Traditional NWP models struggle here; the question is whether data-driven approaches can do better.
approach: Leading team CAMExpedition to develop and evaluate deep learning models on the competition benchmark, focusing on skill in the 2–6 week range.
why_it_matters: S2S forecasts have high socioeconomic value for agriculture, disaster planning, and energy management — but remain underserved by current operational models.
